xwikidoc.name: MCPServerConfigSheet
xwikidoc.creator: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.author: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.title: MCPServerConfigSheet
xwikidoc.content:
{{velocity}} #set ($redirect = $xwiki.relativeRequestURL) #set ($configDocRef = 'AI.MCP.Code.MCPServerConfig') #set ($configClassName = 'AI.MCP.Code.MCPServerConfigClass') #set ($configDoc = $xwiki.getDocument($configDocRef)) #set ($configObject = $configDoc.getObject($configClassName)) ## Auto-create the XObject on first access (e.g. after installing the extension without defaults) #if ($xcontext.action == 'admin' && "$!configObject" == '') #set ($configObject = $configDoc.newObject($configClassName)) #set ($discard = $configDoc.save('Created MCP server configuration', true)) #end #set ($configClass = $xwiki.getDocument($configClassName).getxWikiClass()) {{html clean="false"}}
$configClass.get('serverName').getHint()
{{/html}}$configObject.display('serverName', 'edit'){{html clean="false"}}
$configClass.get('serverDescription').getHint()
{{/html}}$configObject.display('serverDescription', 'edit'){{html clean="false"}}
{{/html}} {{/velocity}}
